name: Sailors Duff
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and brown sugar together until fluffy.
2. Add the beaten egg and molasses to the mixture.
3. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Gradually add the sifted ingredients alternately with boiling water to the butter mixture in small amounts.
5. Mix thoroughly.
6. Pour the batter into a greased mold.
7. Steam for 1 1/2 to 2 hours.
